name: Valentine's Day 2025

sheet.name: Valentine's Day 2025
sheet.background_story: This unfortunate Pilgrim wandered across a beautiful grass field within the Forsaken Lands thinking he was going to have an auspicious day. He was so very wrong! Because in the Forsaken Lands, there is an obsession with burning Wagdie. And since today is Valentine's Day 2025,  a Wagdie must burn! Sorry Pilgrim, I don't make the rules

description: This unfortunate Pilgrim wandered across a beautiful grass field within the Forsaken Lands thinking he was going to have an auspicious day. He was so very wrong!
